---
title: "Methods"
---

## Visualization design

MANTA Gallery is not an online simulation platform. It displays curated, pre-exported simulation scenes.

## Layer conventions

### DEM

The DEM uses `cmcrameri.grayC + relief`.

### Water surface

The water surface is colored by wave height using:

- Blue-to-red diverging `dclaw.tsunami` colormap
- Label: `Wave height (m)`

The water layer is filtered by a water-like solid-fraction cutoff.

### Water analysis overlays

The browser can isolate current-frame inland inundation depth where `b >= 0`
and show water-velocity arrows. Both overlays use the active water-like
solid-fraction cutoff. Cumulative maximum inundation depth and maximum wave
velocity are computed on demand from the first frame through the paused frame.

### Landslide material

The landslide material layer is colored by one of:

- `hm`: solid-phase thickness (m)
- `m`: solid volume fraction
- `Δb`: bed change (m)

The landslide layer uses the `magma` colormap and is filtered by a landslide solid-fraction cutoff.
